attributes.description: Incorporated in 1985, Gujarat Industries is a Public Limited company of the Government of Gujarat. The company is engaged in the business of Electrical Power Generation with a present installed generation capacity of 1184.40MW. The Company has a diversified portfolio of Thermal (Gas and Lignite), Wind, and Solar Power Plant Assets in the State of Gujarat.[1]
